query:
SELECT 'ksi_definitions' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM ksi_definitions
UNION ALL SELECT 'ksi_evidence', COUNT(*) FROM ksi_evidence
UNION ALL SELECT 'ksi_evidence_chains', COUNT(*) FROM ksi_evidence_chains
UNION ALL SELECT 'ksi_control_mappings', COUNT(*) FROM ksi_control_mappings
UNION ALL SELECT 'ksi_validation_runs', COUNT(*) FROM ksi_validation_runs
UNION ALL SELECT 'ksi_validation_schedules', COUNT(*) FROM ksi_validation_schedules
